improvements.title: Perfect order ⭐ bonus — serve while timer >70% = +15 coins + gold particles + high chime
Chef emoji face in HUD reacts: 😄 happy on correct, 🤩 excited on 4+ streak, 😰 sad on wrong
Score popup — +value flies upward with ⭐ on perfect orders, green for normal

skipped.title: Rush Hour event (2× orders)
skipped.reason: Round 3 — saves the best surprise for last

notes: Huge engagement jump. Perfect order mechanic creates a new skill ceiling — experienced players race the timer intentionally. Chef face adds personality at almost zero cost. Score pops make every serve feel rewarding. Score 7.8 → 8.7. One round left.
